'''nathafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oomf|oomf]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-th-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oomf|oomf]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nathafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næthæfæth|næthæfæth]] || [[word:næthæfæj|næthæfæj]] || [[word:næthæfæsh|næthæfæsh]] || [[word:næthæfæ|næthæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nathathafath|nathathafath]] || [[word:nathathafaj|nathathafaj]] || [[word:nathathafash|nathathafash]] || [[word:nathathafa|nathathafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nathafath|nathafath]] || [[word:nathafaj|nathafaj]] || [[word:nathafash|nathafash]] || [[word:nathafa|nathafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nathaffath|nathaffath]] || [[word:nathaffaj|nathaffaj]] || [[word:nathaffash|nathaffash]] || [[word:nathaffaf|nathaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nathafatha|nathafatha]] || [[word:nathafaja|nathafaja]] || [[word:nathafasha|nathafasha]] || [[word:nathafaka|nathafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nathafath|nathafath]] || [[word:nathafaj|nathafaj]] || [[word:nathafash|nathafash]] || [[word:nathafa|nathafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nathafathal|nathafathal]] || [[word:nathafajal|nathafajal]] || [[word:nathafashal|nathafashal]] || [[word:nathafakal|nathafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nathafathatha|nathafathatha]] || [[word:nathafajaja|nathafajaja]] || [[word:nathafashasha|nathafashasha]] || [[word:nathafaka|nathafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nathafathan|nathafathan]] || [[word:nathafajan|nathafajan]] || [[word:nathafashan|nathafashan]] || [[word:nathafakan|nathafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nathafathaoro|nathafathaoro]] || [[word:nathafajaoro|nathafajaoro]] || [[word:nathafashaoro|nathafashaoro]] || [[word:nathafakaoro|nathafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
